description: SynergyGrid health-check alert configuration for Jarvez bot

statusChange.note: Any up->down or down->up transition is always sent without delay

stillDown.note: While a system is down, every 15-min check produces an alert

stillAlive.note: Routine alive confirmations sent once per 75 min (1 in 5 checks, 80% reduction)

expectedAlertVolume.after: ~19 alerts/day (every 75 min) + instant alerts on failures
